TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pakelang, title = Pakelang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakelang} }

S.FORM: Pakelang (Kuwaping a sowal : śľĀśíąÁ•≠ ) Ira ko ci ramoday, cipadesay ato kaacangan a romi'ad, mimingay a demak mato pararamod to kapah ato kaying ato mipafahfah to adaday a pisalisin no cikawasay a demak, o tata'akay a demak i, mato paherek patireng to loma', caay kaeca ira ko pakelang sanay a demak no Pangcah, deng itini i Fata'an a sa'etal ato Tafalong, onini kalipahakan a mifotingay a demak i , mili'alac han nangra, ci mapatayay ato cipadesay a demak, malepon ko demak, o pakelang han nangra, onini tosaay a demak todongay malepon to demak awaay to ko lisin sanay, o no laday to ko 'orip. Orasaka, o pakelang mifoting hananay a demak i, o pipafahfah to tati'ihay i tatirengan a lisin koni, onian koya masaromaay a pinangan no Pangcah. No mifoting sato, deng o foting ko aalaen caay ka saan, i nanomay makaenay ho mangaay to maala, to laday anca o roma ko lisin no mawmahay, maaherek to ko pisalisin to masofoc, pararamod, mitadem, mangaay to pakelang a mifoting, oninian a demak i, deng o fa'inayan ko mamikapot, o fafahiyan itira to i loma' mihalaka to kakaenen. Ono niyaro' to a pisalisin, misakapoloongan to ko pifoting, mato miladis ko Sa'amisan a 'etal a finacadan, no pasawali i misacepo', no Falangaw i mikesi', no Siwkolan i mikomoris, onini a demak i, o pidoedo tona Siwkolang a taholican a mapatalahekal koni mifotingay a lisin no serangawan a demak. Pi'arawan to lakaw śĚéśôĮŚīá,1998," .
S.PHON: pak…ô…ĺaŇč (ko~u~uwapiŇč a so~uwa…ĺ : *** ) ira ko~u ¶i ramo~u…¨~…ģaj, ¶ipa…¨~…ģ…ôsaj ato~u kaa ¶aŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mimiŇčaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak mato~u pararamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u kapańß ato~u kajiŇč ato~u mipafańßfańß to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaj a pisa…ĺisin no~u ¶ikawasaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, o~u tata °akaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, mato~u pańß…ôr…ôk patir…ôŇč to~u …ĺo~uma °, ¶aaj ka…ô ¶a ira ko~u pak…ô…ĺaŇč sanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u paŇč ¶ańß, …¨~…ģ…ôŇč itini i fata °an a sa °…ôta…ĺ ato~u tafa…ĺo~uŇč, o~unini ka…ĺipańßakan a mifo~utiŇčaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i , mi…ĺi °a…ĺa ¶ ńßan naŇčra, ¶i mapatajaj ato~u ¶ipa…¨~…ģ…ôsaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, ma…ĺ…ôpo~un ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak, o~u pak…ô…ĺaŇč ńßan naŇčra, o~unini to~usaaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ma…ĺ…ôpo~un to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak awaaj to~u ko~u …ĺisin sanaj, o~u no~u …ĺa…¨~…ģaj to~u ko~u °o~urip. o~urasaka, o~u pak…ô…ĺaŇč mifo~utiŇč ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, o~u pipafańßfańß to~u tati °ińßaj i tatir…ôŇčan a …ĺisin ko~uni, o~unian ko~uja masaro~umaaj a pinaŇčan no~u paŇč ¶ańß. no~u mifo~utiŇč sato~u, …¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u fo~utiŇč ko~u aa…ĺa…ôn ¶aaj ka saan, i nano~umaj maka…ônaj ńßo~u maŇčaaj to~u maa…ĺa, to~u …ĺa…¨~…ģaj an ¶a o~u ro~uma ko~u …ĺisin no~u mawmańßaj, maańß…ôr…ôk to~u ko~u pisa…ĺisin to~u maso~ufo~u ¶, pararamo~u…¨~…ģ, mita…¨~…ģ…ôm, maŇčaaj to~u pak…ô…ĺaŇč a mifo~utiŇč, o~uninian a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, …¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u fa °inajan ko~u mamikapo~ut, o~u fafańßijan itira to~u i …ĺo~uma ° mińßa…ĺaka to~u kaka…ôn…ôn. o~uno~u nijaro~u ° to~u a pisa…ĺisin, misakapo~u…ĺo~uo~uŇčan to~u ko~u pifo~utiŇč, mato~u mi…ĺa…¨~…ģis ko~u sa °amisan a °…ôta…ĺ a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, no~u pasawa…ĺi i misa ¶…ôpo~u °, no~u fa…ĺaŇčaw i mik…ôsi °, no~u siwko~u…ĺan i miko~umo~uris, o~unini a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, o~u pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~una siwko~u…ĺaŇč a tańßo~u…ĺi ¶an a mapata…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ ko~uni mifo~utiŇčaj a …ĺisin no~u s…ôraŇčawan a …¨~…ģ…ômak. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ***,****," .
S.FORM: Pakelang (Kuwaping a sowal : śľĀśíąÁ•≠ ) Ira ko ci ramoday, cipadesay ato kaacangan a romi'ad, mimingay a demak mato pararamod to kapah ato kaying ato mipafahfah to adaday a pisalisin no cikawasay a demak, o tata'akay a demak i, mato paherek patireng to loma', caay kaeca ira ko pakelang sanay a demak no Pangcah, deng itini i Fata'an a sa'etal ato Tafalong, onini kalipahakan a mifotingay a demak i , mili'alac han nangra, ci mapatayay ato cipadesay a demak, malepon ko demak, o pakelang han nangra, onini tosaay a demak todongay malepon to demak awaay to ko lisin sanay, o no laday to ko 'orip. Orasaka, o pakelang mifoting hananay a demak i, o pipafahfah to tati'ihay i tatirengan a lisin koni, onian koya masaromaay a pinangan no Pangcah. No mifoting sato, deng o foting ko aalaen caay ka saan, i nanomay makaenay ho mangaay to maala, to laday anca o roma ko lisin no mawmahay, maaherek to ko pisalisin to masofoc, pararamod, mitadem, mangaay to pakelang a mifoting, oninian a demak i, deng o fa'inayan ko mamikapot, o fafahiyan itira to i loma' mihalaka to kakaenen. Ono niyaro' to a pisalisin, misakapoloongan to ko pifoting, mato miladis ko Sa'amisan a 'etal a finacadan, no pasawali i misacepo', no Falangaw i mikesi', no Siwkolan i mikomoris, onini a demak i, o pidoedo tona Siwkolang a taholican a mapatalahekal koni mifotingay a lisin no serangawan a demak. Pi'arawan to lakaw śĚéśôĮŚīá,1998," .
